{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231826101AD6805B7143532C7BC8"}"},"total":2676},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593380380244443966","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的超级好看，阳光明媚少女和拧巴傲娇少年，年下，误会重重又好嗑到爆。男主从小缺爱，阴暗腹黑，遇见女主后开启病娇模拟，占有欲极强，却又误以为是情蛊作祟，小心翼翼独自一人生闷气。女主真善美小太阳，人见人爱花见花开，对男主爱而不自知。两人都是纯情宝宝，糖分超标，细品好磕😍😍作者大大太会写了，10分推荐👍👍👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767974721,"group_id":"7554209550094584894","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+dYYxWMDorkfDToiFsTwZwnuqPgPZl0cMcsl6GKZUi8","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/910e62c9ddb54930af82ceedfd263598~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796657&x-signature=WwLg6cSfIOuqxQLWZq3GFB2S2Pw%3D","user_id":"2133486961963152","user_name":"爱吃煲仔饭的鹅."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2133486961963152","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7554209550094584894","book_info":{"abstract":"【双洁1v1+救赎+甜宠+HE】
【直球小甜瓜 x 毒舌阴湿傲娇】
看到书中的正义女配因阻挠反派给女主种情蛊，落得被蛊虫啃食到尸骨无存的悲惨下场，柴小米默默打冷战。
旅途中被毒蝎蛰死，她在古老神秘禁地醒来。
系统：「宿主想复活吗？你的任务是阻挠反派给女主种情蛊。」
柴小米：艹。
异瞳少年从盘旋的蝙蝠群中缓步而来，发间耳畔银饰叮当作响，漂亮得人畜无害。
实际上他恶毒至极，是个彻彻底底黑到骨子里的病娇变态。
柴小米知道，若干年后他将是苗疆最年轻的蛊王。
而她却是随时要领盒饭的炮灰女配，无奈边做反派狗腿子边给反派使绊子。
在无数次暗中阻拦无果后，她索性一把抓住偏执少年，毁灭吧没招了：“这蛊你是非种不可吗？实在不行你种我身上吧。”
少年安静地望向她，异色幽瞳浸着水泽，轻抚她手背的毒蝎刺青。
她的耳坠被他咬在齿间：“还没发现啊，你身上早就种着我的蛊了。”
蝎蛊，五毒之首，用心头血饲养后的威力非同凡响。
少女无力失禁的泪滚进被褥，嗓子哑得发不出声。
这时候，他不是应该放蛊虫啃食她吗，为什么是他亲自在啃？！
到底是哪个环节出错了？？
*
原书名《别惹那个苗疆少年，他病娇又变态》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/50ed7aea488ba284cec261bb5673fbfc","author":"我碎了你随意","author_id":"","book_id":"7554209550094584894","book_name":"这苗疆反派怎么用嘴下蛊？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"34.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7554210022209618494","read_count":"345199","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"504719"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"221","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,腹黑,病娇,双洁,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/163523a8e1aa65e0c047944dd2db75db~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445570&x-signature=RST4u8QYDTmQFcY%2Fm%2FihCV8DbEY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3105497378479079","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231826101AD6805B7143532C7BC8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":93,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":13116,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21646,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":42983},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608270973120512830","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别喜欢这本书！！人物形象写的非常生动，就像有灵魂一样，一言一行都不ooc，而且甜甜的很安心，虽然中间会有一些虐一点的小片段，但是更加跌宕起伏也显出双方内心已经沉沦，剧情走向也不僵硬，承接的很好（比如离离会通过发生一些事时心中生出的异样酸涩来更好的认清自己的心意，这一块比一些没由来的好感更让人觉得舒服）没有平铺直叙，人物关系比较单纯，文笔超级棒（尤其是小米和离离斗嘴打闹、肢体接触的情节我非常爱看嗯对[害羞]）场景刻画的栩栩如生让人感觉可以代入到人物体会到那种情感。这是我回归以来唯一一个吸引到我的作品，期待作者大大继续更新（可不可以一天三更不然不够看）[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":215,"s":211,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774261570532C7BC8%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227608270973120512830%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227554209550094584894%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771443621,"group_id":"7554209550094584894","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"Sunny
